reason: Both answers hit the key points (push back but don't kill the deal, cap at 12 months fees with 2x fallback, narrow but keep IP indemnity, mutuality, cheap legal review, E&O insurance). A is slightly stronger: it adds not indemnifying downstream customers, a mutual consequential-damages waiver, a concrete concession list, and ties the risk to investor diligence, plus a clearer walk-away threshold. B is a bit vaguer on concessions and has a minor tonal misstep. Difference is modest but favors A.
